news.api_views¶

api_views.py - Django REST Framework views for the News application.

Endpoints implemented¶

GET /api/articles/ - List all approved articles GET /api/articles/subscribed/ - Articles from subscribed sources GET /api/articles/<id>/ - Retrieve a single article POST /api/articles/ - Create article (journalists only) PUT /api/articles/<id>/ - Update article (owner / editor) DELETE /api/articles/<id>/ - Delete article (owner / editor) POST /api/articles/<id>/approve/ - Approve article (editors only)

GET /api/newsletters/ - List all newsletters GET /api/newsletters/<id>/ - Retrieve a single newsletter POST /api/newsletters/ - Create newsletter (journalists) PUT /api/newsletters/<id>/ - Update newsletter DELETE /api/newsletters/<id>/ - Delete newsletter

POST /api/approved/ - Internal approval webhook POST /api/register/ - Register a new user

class news.api_views.ApprovedArticleWebhookView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

POST /api/approved/ Internal endpoint that receives approved article data from the signal. AllowAny because the signal sends an unauthenticated internal request.

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.AllowAny'>]¶
post(request)[source]¶

Log the approved article payload received from the signal.

class news.api_views.ArticleApproveView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

POST /api/articles/<id>/approve/ Allows an editor to approve an article for publication.

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>, <class 'news.permissions.IsEditor'>]¶
post(request, pk)[source]¶

Approve the specified article.

class news.api_views.ArticleDetailView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET - Retrieve a single article (any authenticated user). PUT - Update an article (editor or owning journalist). DELETE - Delete an article (editor or owning journalist).

delete(request, pk)[source]¶

Delete an article (editor or owning journalist only).

get(request, pk)[source]¶

Retrieve a single article by primary key.

get_permissions()[source]¶

Instantiates and returns the list of permissions that this view requires.

put(request, pk)[source]¶

Update an article (editor or owning journalist only).

class news.api_views.ArticleListCreateView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET - Return all approved articles (any authenticated user). POST - Create a new article (journalists only).

get(request)[source]¶

Return a list of all approved articles.

get_permissions()[source]¶

Instantiates and returns the list of permissions that this view requires.

post(request)[source]¶

Create a new article; author is forced to the current user.

class news.api_views.NewsletterDetailView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET - Retrieve a single newsletter. PUT - Update a newsletter (editor or owning journalist). DELETE - Delete a newsletter (editor or owning journalist).

delete(request, pk)[source]¶

Delete a newsletter (editor or owning journalist only).

get(request, pk)[source]¶

Retrieve a single newsletter by primary key.

get_permissions()[source]¶

Instantiates and returns the list of permissions that this view requires.

put(request, pk)[source]¶

Update a newsletter (editor or owning journalist only).

class news.api_views.NewsletterListCreateView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET - List all newsletters (any authenticated user). POST - Create a newsletter (journalists only).

get(request)[source]¶

Return a list of all newsletters.

get_permissions()[source]¶

Instantiates and returns the list of permissions that this view requires.

post(request)[source]¶

Create a new newsletter; author is forced to the current user.

class news.api_views.PublisherListView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET /api/publishers/ - List all publishers.

get(request)[source]¶

Return a list of all publishers.

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
class news.api_views.RegisterView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

POST /api/register/ - Register a new user account.

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.AllowAny'>]¶
post(request)[source]¶

Register a new user and return their public profile.

class news.api_views.SubscribedArticlesView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: APIView

GET /api/articles/subscribed/ Return approved articles from the reader’s subscribed sources.

get(request)[source]¶

Return articles from the reader’s subscribed sources.

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶

NewsApp
